welcomeMessage: Easily test your device's display quality in a few simple steps.
completionMessage: You have finished your screen tests. Thank you for using Screen Tester!

touch.instructions: Touch and drag your finger across the area below. The path will be drawn in real time.

rgb.instructions: Tap a color to fill the screen and check for color uniformity and visibility.

deadpixel.instructions: Tap the area below to cycle through solid colors. Look for any stuck or dead pixels.

uniformity.instructions: Check for brightness and color uniformity across the screen.

colordistance.instructions: Check your screen's ability to distinguish between similar colors.

gradients.instructions: Check for smoothness and banding in color gradients.

sharpness.instructions: Check for clarity and sharpness of lines and text.

viewingangle.instructions: Check for color and brightness consistency at different angles.

gamma.instructions: Check your display's gamma response with grayscale bars.

responsetime.instructions: Test your display's response time with a moving bar.
